title: Allow "Embed Everything" Doc Block widget to be added via API

posts.author: chadhutchins10 (Chad Hutchins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our app uses several iframes which are used mostly in item views today.

We’ve started improving our app’s onboarding process with Monday Docs to help provide more information to the customer.

It would be awesome to use the API to add “Embed Everything” widget content blocks to our onboarding docs.

With this, our user could test our app in real-time with their actual data. This would greatly improve user adoption.

Please consider!
